subcodes.first_line: O Samandar! Wert thou to become aware of My sorrow, thou wouldst lament for My soul by reason of that which hath befallen Me at the hands of them that claim to love Me. Verily, the oppressor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سمندر لو تطلع بحزنی لتنوح لنفسی بما ورد علی من الذین ادعوا حبی ان الظالم
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for the departed, @spiritual transformation
